case_title: ANDREA DE LA PENA VS. HILTON WORLDWIDE, INC.

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LA PENA, ANDREA AS TO DEFENDANT HILTON WORLDWIDE, INC. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-17-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-16-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-02-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-17-2012 CONTINUED TO NOV-28-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LA PENA, ANDREA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LA PENA, ANDREA SERVED DEC-18-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HILTON WORLDWIDE, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2013 CONTINUED TO MAR-19-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-15-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF ANDREA DE LA PENA IN RESPONSE TO MAY-14-2013 OSC RE: DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LA PENA, ANDREA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-28-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-14-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-25-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAY-14-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE MAR-19-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-25-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
